ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heating_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heating system */,
  "watersys" TEXT /* Water system type (e.g., dedicated boiler) */,
  "finwhoty" TEXT /* Fuel source for the heating system */,
  "heating_system" TEXT /* Description of the heating system */,
  "flue" TEXT /* Flue type associated with the system */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the heating system */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating (e.g., standard boiler) */,
  "responsiveness" REAL /* Responsiveness rating of the heating system */,
  "heat_code" INTEGER /* Heat code identifier */,
  "rd_sap" REAL /* SAP rating for the heating system */,
  "tariff" INTEGER /* Tariff associated with the heating system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the heating system was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the heating system is installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the heating system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the heating system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the heating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_systems_tariff FOREIGN KEY ("tariff") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_systems_heating_type FOREIGN KEY ("heating_type") REFERENCES system_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heating_systems_flue FOREIGN KEY ("flue") REFERENCES flue_types ("flue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficiency_metrics" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency metric record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated heating system */,
  "basic_efficiency" REAL /* Basic efficiency rating of the heating system */,
  "winter_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating during winter conditions */,
  "summer_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating during summer conditions */,
  "installation_year" INTEGER /* Year when the efficiency metrics were last updated */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* A brief history of maintenance activities */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Average energy consumption in kWh */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Emissions in kg of CO2 per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efficiency_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES heating_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., mains gas, oil, coal) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the fuel type */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor for the fuel type in kg of CO2 per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff plan */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the tariff */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the tariff is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the tariff is valid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heating system type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the heating system type (e.g., standard_boiler) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heating system type */,
  "min_efficiency" REAL /* Minimum efficiency rating for the system type */,
  "max_efficiency" REAL /* Maximum efficiency rating for the system type */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the system type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flue_types" (
  "flue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flue type */,
  "flue_type" TEXT /* Description of the flue type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the flue */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Average installation cost of the flue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flue_id")
)
